Stories Buying Guides About

The watch collection

A world of watches, arranged for discovery.

Move through price, character, and purpose. When a watch feels right, continue to its current CreationWatches listing.

Everyday discoveries

Under $100

Straightforward, characterful watches for daily life.

Casio Casio G-Shock Illuminator DW-9052-2VDR DW9052-2VDR 200M Digital Men's Watch $62.94 Casio Casio G-Shock DW-9052-1VDR DW9052-1VDR Men's Watch $58.95 Casio Casio G-Shock Velocity Indicator Alarm GA-100-1A4 Men's Watch $82.57 Casio Casio G-Shock World Time Alarm GA-100-1A2 GA-100 Men's Watch $88.92

Considered value

$100 to $300

A richer balance of design, heritage, and capability.

Seiko Seiko 5 Military Automatic Nylon Strap SNK807K2 Men's Watch $198.82 Seiko Seiko 5 Automatic SNK809 SNK809K1 SNK809K 21 Jewel Men's Watch $218.80 Seiko Seiko 5 Automatic SNK607K1 SNK607K SNK607 Men's Watch $148.86 Seiko Seiko 5 Sports SNZG13 SNZG13J1 SNZG13J Automatic Analog Men's Watch $198.82

Collector territory

$300 and beyond

Mechanical depth and watches made to mark an occasion.

Seiko Seiko Automatic Diver's 200M Jubilee Bracelet SKX009K2 Men's Watch $777.33 Seiko Seiko Automatic Diver's SKX009 SKX009K1 SKX009K Men's Watch $530.56 Seiko Seiko Automatic Diver's 200m Made in Japan SKX009 SKX009J1 SKX009J Men's Watch $598.45 Hamilton Hamilton Khaki X-Wind Automatic Chronograph H77616533 Men's Watch $1375.28
